text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo doesn't seem as upbeat as usual.

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You're looking under the weather, King...

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You've been working so hard lately. You must be
tired.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohohoho! My silly darlings, you worry too
much! There's nothing wrong whatsoever!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course! A king never falters. Come on, let's do
one more—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
M-my legs just got a bit tangled! Nothing to get
yourselves worked up over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo may be acting strong, but it's obvious
that she's tired. Maybe I should change her race
schedule...
